possible_causes: No or too little water in the product
Cable to pump or water pressure sensor defective
troubleshooting_steps: Refill the heating installation with water.
Check the water pressure sensor and replace if necessary.

possible_causes: Gas meter defective or gas pressure monitor has triggered
troubleshooting_steps: Check the gas supply and open the gas stopcock.
Inspect the ignition electrode and ignition lead; replace if damaged.

fault_codes.description: Water pressure sensor signal out of range (too low)
possible_causes: Interruption/short circuit of water pressure sensor
Interruption/short circuit to GND in supply line to water pressure sensor
troubleshooting_steps: Check the plug-in connections on the water pressure sensor.
Test the wiring harness for continuity.
